channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: GSIS and SSS adopt four-day onsite work week to save energy
item.description: The Government Service Insurance System (GSIS) and the Social Security System (SSS) are implementing a four-day onsite work week starting March 9 as part of the government’s energy conservation effort...

item.title: LAWMA MD Highlights Major Reforms and Infrastructure Upgrades Boosting Waste Collection in Lagos
item.description: The Managing Director of Lagos Waste Management Authority (LAWMA), Dr Muyiwa Gbadegesin, don yarn say big reforms and better infrastructure don seriously improve how waste dey collected for Lagos Stat...

item.title: Canadian Government Begins Evacuation of Citizens from Middle East Amid Rising Tensions
item.description: The Canadian government has successfully landed its first chartered flight to evacuate citizens from the Middle East amid escalating regional conflict. The flight, originating from Dubai, had a capaci...

item.title: Brazilian Women Protest Against Rising Gender-Based Violence Following Alleged Copacabana Assault
item.description: In Brazil, International Women’s Day protests highlighted the growing crisis of violence against women, spurred by the alleged gang rape of a 17-year-old in Rio de Janeiro’s Copacabana neighbourhood. ...

item.title: South Africa Advances Regulatory Reforms to Boost Cannabis and Hemp Industry
item.description: South Africa is implementing comprehensive regulatory reforms and commercialisation policies to develop a formal cannabis and hemp industry, aiming to stimulate economic growth, create jobs, and suppo...

item.title: Study Links Receptivity to Corporate Buzzwords with Poorer Decision-Making and Analytical Skills
item.description: A recent study from Cornell University, led by cognitive psychologist Shane Littrell and published in the journal Personality and Individual Differences, explores how susceptibility to corporate bulls...

item.title: Democrat Talarico Faces Major Challenges in Texas Senate Race
item.description: Democratic candidate Talarico has recently gained momentum in Texas, signaling a potential opportunity for the Democratic Party to make inroads in a traditionally Republican stronghold. Despite this p...

item.title: Government launches initiative to empower women sarpanches and curb proxy leadership
item.description: The Government of India has initiated a nationwide social media campaign to tackle the long-standing issue of 'Sarpanch Pati', a practice where male relatives, often husbands, exercise authority in pl...

item.title: Full Schedule and Entry List for Safari Rally Naivasha 2026
item.description: The 2026 Safari Rally, the third round of the World Rally Championships (WRC), is set to kick off in Naivasha from Thursday, March 12, running through Sunday, March 15. This year, the rally will be fu...

item.title: Ben Tudhope secures silver for Australia at 2026 Winter Paralympics
item.description: Australian snowboarder Ben Tudhope claimed silver in the men’s snowboard cross SB-LL2 event at the 2026 Milano Cortina Paralympic Games, marking Australia's first medal of these Games. Despite disloca...

item.title: Tanzania boosts security measures for AFCON 2027 preparations
item.description: Tanzania is busy preparing to host AFCON 2027 and security is at the top of the agenda. The National Organising Committee has started putting strong systems in place to make sure the tournament goes s...

item.title: NDDC Urged to Prioritise Household Electrification Over Street Lighting in Niger Delta
item.description: The Niger Delta Development Commission (NDDC), set up in 2000 to tackle underdevelopment, environmental damage, and neglect in Nigeria's oil-rich Niger Delta region, has carried out plenty good works ...

item.title: Trump Warns Iran's Next Supreme Leader Must Have US Approval or Face Short Tenure
item.description: United States President Donald Trump don talk say anybody wey emerge as Iran next Supreme Leader without him approval no go last long. For him interview with ABC News on Sunday, Trump explain say him ...

item.title: Over 500 Andhra Pradesh Residents Stranded in Middle East Due to Israel-Iran Conflict Return Safely to India
item.description: Amid the ongoing tensions between Israel and Iran, more than 500 residents from Andhra Pradesh found themselves stranded in the Middle East. The conflict has disrupted normal travel and created challe...

item.title: Two Police Officers and Three Civilians Arrested for Illegal Drugs in Taguig
item.description: In a recent anti-narcotics operation in Barangay Bicutan, Taguig, two policemen and three civilians were arrested for involvement in illegal drug activities. The officers, Corporals Dennis and Ralph, ...

item.title: Suspicious bag at Mombasa Airport VIP lounge safely handled by police
item.description: On Sunday, Moi International Airport in Mombasa experienced a tense moment when an unattended bag was spotted near the VIP lounge, prompting authorities to evacuate the area immediately. The airport q...

item.title: Families dispute First Minister's claim of apology over Queen Elizabeth University Hospital issues
item.description: Families affected by a long-running scandal at Glasgow's Queen Elizabeth University Hospital have publicly disputed Scottish First Minister John Swinney's claim that he offered an apology during a rec...

item.title: Fuel tax credit scheme costs taxpayers billions while undermining emissions cuts
item.description: The Australian federal government is set to spend billions this year on the fuel tax credit scheme, a policy that effectively reduces the cost of diesel and petrol for miners and other industries. Cri...

item.title: Reflections on Iran's Political Struggles and Civilian Suffering
item.description: The article is a personal reflection on the ongoing turmoil in Iran, particularly in light of recent violent attacks and political instability. The author describes anxiously tracking news updates abo...

item.title: Forensic audit reveals Emfuleni municipality lost millions on undelivered vehicles
item.description: A recent forensic audit has uncovered that Emfuleni Local Municipality in Gauteng lost over R16 million through irregular vehicle purchases and non-delivery of equipment. Between November and December...
